extraction.one_line_summary: HINDLEY Jai won after sitting on GEOGHEGAN HART throughout Stelvio, then attacking late on Laghi to take pink by 12 seconds over teammate KELDERMAN.
tactical_patterns: DENNIS Rowan extracted 1:41 on Stelvio descent after pacemaking, demonstrating INEOS invested domestique descending gains crucial time.
KELDERMAN struggled with apparel during Stelvio descent at -46sec, immediately lost rhythm on Laghi finale revealing descent recovery issues.
HINDLEY sat on GEOGHEGAN HART entire Stelvio ascent then counterattacked late, inverting traditional defending-pink tactics to steal lead.
ALMEIDA dropped halfway up Stelvio losing 4:51, demonstrating younger riders crack midway through final-week alpine stages not summits.

rider_signals.DENNIS Rowan: positive: Pulled 1:41 advantage on Stelvio descent after domestique pacing work, elite-level descending beyond typical support role
rider_signals.KELDERMAN Wilco: negative: Lost 55 seconds during descent with apparel struggles, then couldn't match rhythm on final climb despite taking pink
rider_signals.HINDLEY Jai: positive: Tactically mature wheel-sitting on Stelvio then late attack on Laghi, stealing pink from stronger-positioned teammate
rider_signals.GEOGHEGAN HART Tao: positive: Claimed 3-second bonus mid-stage showing time-hunting awareness, now only 15 seconds from pink in podium fight
rider_signals.ALMEIDA Joao: negative: Pink jersey for fortnight but cracked halfway up Stelvio not summit, dropped from 1st to 5th losing 4:51
rider_signals.BILBAO Pello: positive: Found rhythm on Laghi finale after poor descent, closed to podium contention showing climbing recovery capability
